---
title: "Sujan Bhattarai"
resources: resume.pdf
image: pic.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope-check
      href: mailto:sujan@ucsb.edu
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/Sujan-Bhattarai12/
    - text: Resume
      icon: file-text
      href: resume.pdf
  id: ppc
navbar:
  links:
    - text: Home
      href: "#"
    - text: About
      href: "#ppc"
    - text: Projects
      href: "#projects"
    - text: Contact
      href: "#contact"
---

:::{#ppc}
<h1 id="tagline">Entrepreneurial and Innovative</h1>
<center>
<p id="description">Analytical thinker with a passion for innovation. Committed to excellence and continuous improvement.</p>
</center>
:::

```{css}
<style>
  #tagline {
    animation: fadeInOut 1s ease infinite;
    color: white ; /* Change color to your preference #3498db */
  }

 #description {
    font-size: 1.2em;
    color: lightgrey;
    max-width: 600px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  nav {
    background-color: #2c3e50; /* Change color to your preference */
    padding: 1em;
    font-size: 1.1em;
  }

  nav a {
    color: white; /* Change color to your preference */
    margin: 0 1em;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: color 0.3s ease;
    position: relative;
  }

  nav a:hover {
    color: white; /* Change color to your preference */
  }
  
   nav a:hover::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    width: 100%;
    height: 5px; /* Adjust thickness as needed */
    background-color: white; /* Change color to your preference */
    bottom: -2px; /* Adjust distance from text */
    left: 0;
  }

  @keyframes fadeInOut {
    0%, 100% {
      opacity: 0;
    }
    50% {
      opacity: 1;
    }
  }
  
  body {
    background-color: #003152; /* Change color to your preference */
  }
</style>
